critic_raw:
CRITIQUE:

1. PROMOTION CAMPAIGN CONFOUND (promotion_campaign_confound): Major creator campaign with sports event content and preferential push placement launched in week 2 of the 4-week rollout. This independently increases watch time through promoted high-quality content and notification-driven reactivation.

2. ENTRYPOINT MIXING (mixed_entrypoint_measurement): Sessions from push notifications are mixed with home-feed sessions. Notification-driven sessions may have higher watch times because they surface promoted event content. Aggregate watch-time improvement cannot be attributed to the feed ranker alone.

3. NO LOG REPLAY (no_log_replay_comparison): Neither ranker was replayed on the same request set. Traffic composition changed across the measurement window, making the before/after comparison ambiguous.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE:

The new model genuinely uses a larger candidate pool, a new loss function, and richer features. These are real improvements. The model may still be better even in the absence of the promotion.

However, I concede: the 6% aggregate lift cannot be attributed specifically to the feed ranker because the concurrent promotion campaign and notification-session mixing are independent mechanisms for increased watch time. The paper's claim that the uplift 'indicates the new model surfaces more relevant content' is overstated.

The appropriate test: separate home-feed sessions from notification-driven sessions, and replay both models on matched request logs. If the new model is genuinely better, it will show improvement on ordinary home-feed traffic with promotion effects controlled.
adjudication_raw: Both parties converge on the same resolution: the 6% aggregate lift is confounded; the model may still improve engagement on ordinary home-feed traffic; an entrypoint-separated analysis or log replay is required. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

empirical_test.measure: Watch-time per home-feed-initiated session, excluding notification-reactivated sessions; log replay with fixed traffic composition
empirical_test.success_criterion: Lift disappears on home-feed sessions or on event-neutral log replay
empirical_test.failure_criterion: New ranker improves watch time on home-feed sessions and event-neutral log replay consistently
